metadata.name: sklearn2pmml
metadata.license: GNU Affero General Public License (AGPL) version 3.0
metadata.summary: Python library for converting Scikit-Learn pipelines to PMML

functions.name: sklearn2pmml.preprocessing.lightgbm.make_lightgbm_dataframe_mapper
documentation:
Construct a DataFrameMapper for feeding complex data into a LGBMModel.

Parameters:
----------

dtypes: iterable of tuples (column, dtype)

missing_value_aware: boolean
        If true, use missing value aware transformers.

Returns:
-------
Tuple (DataFrameMapper, list of categorical columns indices)

functions.name: sklearn2pmml.preprocessing.lightgbm.make_lightgbm_column_transformer
documentation:
Construct a ColumnTransformer for feeding complex data into a LGBMModel.

Parameters:
----------

dtypes: iterable of tuples (column, dtype)

missing_value_aware: boolean
        If true, use missing value aware transformers.

Returns:
-------
Tuple (ColumnTransformer, list of categorical column indices)

functions.name: sklearn2pmml.preprocessing.xgboost.make_xgboost_dataframe_mapper
documentation:
Construct a DataFrameMapper for feeding complex data into an XGBModel.

Parameters:
----------

dtypes: iterable of tuples (column, dtype)

missing_value_aware: boolean
        If true, use missing value aware transformers.

Returns:
-------
DataFrameMapper

functions.name: sklearn2pmml.preprocessing.xgboost.make_xgboost_column_transformer
documentation:
Construct a ColumnTransformer for feeding complex data into an XGBModel.

Parameters:
----------

dtypes: iterable of tuples (column, dtype)

missing_value_aware: boolean
        If true, use missing value aware transformers.

Returns:
-------
ColumnTransformer

functions.name: sklearn2pmml.make_pmml_pipeline
documentation:
Wraps a Scikit-Learn estimator or pipeline object into a PMML pipeline object.

Parameters:
----------
estimator: BaseEstimator
        The estimator or pipeline object.

active_fields: list of strings, optional
        Feature names. If missing, "x1", "x2", .., "xn" are assumed.

target_fields: list of strings, optional
        Label name(s). If missing, "y" is assumed.

functions.name: sklearn2pmml.sklearn2pmml
documentation:
Converts a fitted estimator or pipeline object to PMML.

Parameters:
----------
estimator: BaseEstimator
        The estimator or pipeline object.

pmml_path: string
        The file path where the PMML document should be saved.

with_repr: boolean, optional
        If true, insert a string containing a printable representation of the estimator object into the PMML document.

pmml_schema: string
        The PMML schema version for the PMML document.

java_home: string, optional
        The path to Java installation directory.
        Functionally analogous to the JAVA_HOME environment variable.

java_opts: list of strings, optional
        Java options.
        Functionally analogous to the JAVA_OPTS environment variable.

user_classpath: list of strings, optional
        The paths to JAR files that provide custom Transformer, Selector and/or Estimator converter classes.
        The SkLearn2PMML classpath is constructed by appending user JAR files to package JAR files.

dump_flavour: string, optional
        The flavour of pickle dump files.

debug: boolean, optional
        If true, print information about the conversion process.

functions.name: sklearn2pmml.load_class_mapping
documentation:
Loads the class mapping.

Parameters:
----------
user_classpath: list of strings, optional
        The paths to JAR files that provide custom Transformer, Selector and/or Estimator converter classes.

Returns:
-------
mapping: dict
        Mapping from Python class names to Java converter class names.

functions.name: sklearn2pmml.make_class_mapping_jar
documentation:
Generates a class mapping JAR file.

Parameters:
----------
mapping: dict of strings
        Mapping from Python class names to Java converter class names.

path: string
        The path to output JAR file.

classes.name: sklearn2pmml.preprocessing.Aggregator
documentation: Aggregate continuous data.

classes.name: sklearn2pmml.preprocessing.CastTransformer
documentation: Change data type.

classes.name: sklearn2pmml.preprocessing.CutTransformer
documentation: Bin continuous data to categorical.

classes.name: sklearn2pmml.preprocessing.DurationTransformer
documentation: Calculate time difference.

classes.name: sklearn2pmml.preprocessing.DaysSinceYearTransformer
documentation: Calculate the number of days since the epoch.

classes.name: sklearn2pmml.preprocessing.SecondsSinceYearTransformer
documentation: Calculate the number of seconds since the epoch.

classes.name: sklearn2pmml.preprocessing.SecondsSinceMidnightTransformer
documentation: Calculate the number of seconds since midnight.

classes.name: sklearn2pmml.preprocessing.ExpressionTransformer
documentation:
Transform data using a Python expression.

Parameters:
----------
map_missing_to: scalar, optional
        The return value when any of the expression arguments is missing.

default_value: scalar, optional
        The return value when the expression result is missing.

invalid_value_treatment: string
        The action to take when the evaluation of the expression raises an error.

classes.name: sklearn2pmml.preprocessing.IdentityTransformer
documentation: Passes data through as-is.

classes.name: sklearn2pmml.preprocessing.DateTimeFormatter
documentation:
Formats dates, times and datetimes according to a pattern. Analogous to C's strftime() function.

Parameters:
----------
pattern: string
        A POSIX-compliant formatting pattern.

classes.name: sklearn2pmml.preprocessing.NumberFormatter
documentation:
Formats numbers according to a pattern. Analogous to C's printf() function.

Parameters:
----------
pattern: string
        A POSIX-compliant formatting pattern.

classes.name: sklearn2pmml.preprocessing.LookupTransformer
documentation:
Re-map 1D categorical data.

If the mapping is not found, returns `default_value`.

See also:
--------
FilterLookupTransformer

classes.name: sklearn2pmml.preprocessing.FilterLookupTransformer
documentation:
Selectively re-map 1D categorical data.

If the mapping is not found, returns the original value unchanged.

See also:
--------
LookupTransformer

classes.name: sklearn2pmml.preprocessing.MultiLookupTransformer
documentation: Re-map multidimensional categorical data.

classes.name: sklearn2pmml.preprocessing.PMMLLabelBinarizer
documentation: Binarize categorical data in a missing value-aware way.

classes.name: sklearn2pmml.preprocessing.PMMLLabelEncoder
documentation: Encode categorical data in a missing value-aware way.

classes.name: sklearn2pmml.preprocessing.PowerFunctionTransformer
documentation: Raise numeric data to power.

classes.name: sklearn2pmml.preprocessing.ConcatTransformer
documentation: Concat data to string.

classes.name: sklearn2pmml.preprocessing.MatchesTransformer
documentation: Match RE pattern.

classes.name: sklearn2pmml.preprocessing.ReplaceTransformer
documentation: Replace all RE pattern matches.

classes.name: sklearn2pmml.preprocessing.StringNormalizer
documentation: Normalize the case and surrounding whitespace.

classes.name: sklearn2pmml.preprocessing.SubstringTransformer
documentation: Extract substring.

classes.name: sklearn2pmml.preprocessing.WordCountTransformer
documentation: Count tokens.

functions.name: sklearn2pmml.tpot.make_pmml_config
documentation:
Translates a regular TPOT configuration to a PMML-compatible TPOT configuration.

Parameters:
----------
obj: config
        The configuration dictionary.

user_classpath: list of strings, optional
        The paths to JAR files that provide custom Transformer, Selector and/or Estimator converter classes.
        The SkLearn2PMML classpath is constructed by appending user JAR files to package JAR files.
